settings.heading: Choose the right RBP pathway
settings.text: Find the practical route for advisory, consulting, implementation, operations, resources, membership or support.

settings.heading: Start with the kind of help you need
settings.text: Use these routes to move from a broad business need to a practical next step.

settings.title: Advisory
settings.text: Decision support, business review and next-step planning.

settings.title: Consulting
settings.text: Structured project support, recommendations and roadmaps.

settings.title: Implementation
settings.text: Setup, delivery, onboarding and practical business infrastructure.

settings.heading: Find resources, offers and support
settings.text: Use these routes when the next step is operational support, self-serve resources or help choosing the right option.

settings.title: Operations Hub
settings.text: Services, resources, marketplace links and support for operating work.

settings.title: Essentials
settings.text: Templates, toolkits and practical resource pathways.

settings.title: Support
settings.text: Contact, onboarding, FAQs and support routing.

settings.heading: What RBP pathways help you decide or do
settings.text: Each route is designed to move a business owner from uncertainty to a clearer action, service or support request.

settings.title: Decision support
settings.text: Clarify risks, trade-offs and the recommended next step before committing time or budget.

settings.title: Structured problem-solving
settings.text: Turn a broad business issue into recommendations, scope and a workable route forward.

settings.title: Delivery and support
settings.text: Move into setup, documentation, handover, resources or support when the work needs action.

settings.heading: Use the pathway that matches the job
settings.text: Start with the business issue, then choose whether you need advice, a roadmap, implementation, resources or support.

settings.title: Clarify the business issue
settings.text: Name the decision, operational problem, resource need or support issue.

settings.title: Choose the closest route
settings.text: Use Advisory, Consulting, Implementation, Operations Hub, Essentials, Membership or Support.

settings.title: Move to a practical next step
settings.text: Proceed to the relevant service, product, resource, offer or contact pathway.

settings.heading: Pathway questions
settings.text: Use these answers when you are not sure which RBP route best fits the business need.

settings.question: Where should I start?
settings.answer: Start with Advisory when you need a decision view, Consulting when the issue needs structured diagnosis, Implementation when work needs to be set up, and Support when you need routing help.

settings.question: What if I choose the wrong route?
settings.answer: Use Support if the right route is unclear. RBP can point the request toward the most practical next step.

settings.heading: Contact support with the business context
settings.text: Share what you are trying to decide or complete so the request can be routed properly.
